title: Valaiorp Plan
description: A Valaiorp execution plan — a sequence of steps each mapped to a tool or module.

id.description: Auto-generated plan ID. Leave blank — runtime sets this.

contextId.description: Execution context ID. Set automatically by ManualPlanner at runtime.

autonomyLevel.description: Degree of autonomous decision-making permitted (0.0 = fully supervised, 1.0 = fully autonomous).

planner.description: Information about the planner that produced this plan.

type.description: Planner type (Reactive, Deliberative, Hierarchical, LlmBased, AutonomyAware, Manual).

planningTokens.description: LLM token usage during planning (only present for AI planners).

governance.description: Policy and risk controls for this plan.

policyChecks.description: Policy check gates to apply (e.g. PreExecution, PostExecution).

requiresApproval.description: Whether a human must approve this plan before execution.

riskScore.description: Computed risk score (0.0 = no risk, 1.0 = highest risk).

author.description: Who or what authored the plan.

workflowState.description: Shared mutable state available to all steps via context.WorkflowState.

dependencies.description: Tools and modules this plan requires.

name.description: Unique step name within this plan. Used for variable binding references (${StepName.Results.Field}).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this step does.

type.description: Step type: Tool, Module, or Agent.

toolId.description: ID of the tool or module to execute. Must match a registered tool/module ID.

moduleId.description: ID of the module this step belongs to (informational only — use toolId to invoke a module).

agentId.description: Target agent ID for multi-agent delegation. When set, the step is dispatched as an AgentMessage instead of executing a local tool.

determinism.description: Determinism level for this specific step.

priority.description: Execution priority (higher = earlier in parallel batches).

inputs.description: Key-value parameters passed to the tool. Values can be strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, or ${StepName.Results.Field} references.

expectedOutputs.description: Typed output constraints used for post-condition validation. Use $type, $min, $max to declare expectations.

errorHandling.description: Retry, circuit-breaker, and fallback configuration for this step.

validation.description: Pre- and post-conditions evaluated before and after step execution.

observability.description: Logging and tracing configuration for this step.

metrics.description: Metric names to emit on step completion.

trace.description: Emit a distributed trace span for this step.

nextSteps.description: Explicit step routing. Overrides sequential default when set.

onSuccess.description: Step IDs to execute on success.

onFailure.description: Step IDs to execute on failure (e.g. an error-handler step).

condition.description: Expression evaluated before this step runs. Step is skipped (marked success) when false. Supported syntax: WorkflowState['key'] == value | != value | > N | < N | CONTAINS substring. Example: "WorkflowState['status'] == 'active'" or "WorkflowState['itemName'] CONTAINS 'Apple iPhone'"

elseStepId.description: Name of the step to route to when condition evaluates false. If omitted the step is simply skipped.

isLoopStart.description: Marks this step as the start of a repeating loop body. Pair with a later isLoopEnd step.

isLoopEnd.description: Marks this step as the end of a loop body. When loopCondition is still true, execution jumps back to the step after the matching isLoopStart and WorkflowState['iteration'] is incremented.

loopCondition.description: Condition re-evaluated after each loop iteration. Loop stops when false (max 1000 iterations). Syntax: 'iteration < N' | 'iteration <= N' | WorkflowState expression. Example: "iteration < 5"

loopStartId.description: Name of the matching isLoopStart step. Required on isLoopEnd steps.

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata for tooling, logging, or UI display.

type.description: Condition type (ContextCheck, WorkflowStateCheck, StepDependencyCheck, OutputCheck, FileExistsCheck).

errorMessage.description: Message surfaced when the condition fails.

dependsOn.description: Step IDs that must have completed (StepDependencyCheck only).
